recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: A quartet of humanoid turtles, trained by their mentor in ninjitsu, must learn to work together to face the menace of Shredder and the Foot Clan.

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

recommendations.title: Pinocchio

recommendations.title: Interstate 60
recommendations.overview: An aspiring painter meets various characters and learns valuable lessons while traveling across America.

recommendations.title: Guillermo del Toro's Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: During the rise of fascism in Mussolini's Italy, a wooden boy brought magically to life struggles to live up to his father's expectations.

recommendations.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: A young boy wins a tour through the most magnificent chocolate factory in the world, led by the world's most unusual candy maker.
